name: Cart Recovery
objective: Recover revenue from abandoned carts; primary KPI is cart recovery rate (purchases within the 7-day window / journeys entered).

entry_conditions: messageable on >= 1 channel (consent checked per channel per step)

audience.include: Identified users whose cart is non-empty 1 hour after the last add_to_cart, with no purchase since
exclude: cart value below 150 TL (low-value floor from intake)

other_exits: unsubscribe (exits that channel's steps; whole journey if single consented channel)

steps.intent: Cart reminder: contents + free-shipping threshold, zero pressure
Checkout continuation: resume payment step, deeplink to checkout
Short cart nudge, deeplink to cart
steps.branch_condition: no begin_checkout AND step 1 not opened

steps.intent: Objection handling: shipping cost, 30-day returns, payment options
Social proof on cart items (reviews and purchase counts from real data)
High-value cart: personal styling help offer (human reply-to)
Real expiry notice: cart purges on {{cart_expiry_date}} (true system date)

experiment.ab_test: step-1 subject line: Variant A (Sepetin seni bekliyor...) vs Variant B ({{product_name}} hala sepetinde)

data_gaps: cart_value computed CRM-side from synced add_to_cart/remove_from_cart events; native cart-state attribute would remove drift risk
RFM attributes would allow suppressing the step-8 incentive for discount-affine users
